name: Penuche Topped Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Blend together shortening and sugar; cream well.
3. Blend in 2 eggs, one at a time; beat for 1 minute.
4. Combine milk and vanilla.
5. Add the mixture from step 4 to the mixture from step 2 alternately with the dry ingredients, blending thoroughly.
6. Pour the batter into a well-greased and lightly floured 12x8x2-inch pan.
7. Combine brown sugar, nuts, and butter or margarine; sprinkle over the batter.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes.
9. Serve warm with whipped cream.
